PubMed ID: 26699290. 2015/09/08 00:00. PURPOSE: Suboptimal dosage evaluated from postimplant dosimetry of prostate 
brachytherapy creates conundrum that needs resolution. This pilot study was 
undertaken to explore the feasibility of summing and visualizing radiation 
dosage from multimodality treatment.
